label: Ritual stage
description: Base schema for ritual stage objects. Subclass is selected by the Class attribute.

defaultDuty.label: Default duty
defaultDuty.description: DutyDef assigned to pawns that do not have a role-specific duty in this stage.

endTriggers.label: End triggers
endTriggers.description: List of triggers that end this stage when any one fires. Each li selects a class via the Class attribute.

failTriggers.label: Fail triggers
failTriggers.description: List of triggers that fail the ritual when any one fires. Each li selects a class via the Class attribute.

preAction.label: Pre-action
preAction.description: Action executed at the start of this stage. Class attribute selects the subclass.

postAction.label: Post-action
postAction.description: Action executed when this stage ends normally. Class attribute selects the subclass.

interruptedAction.label: Interrupted action
interruptedAction.description: Action executed when this stage is interrupted. Class attribute selects the subclass.

pawnLeaveAction.label: Pawn leave action
pawnLeaveAction.description: Action executed when a role pawn leaves the ritual during this stage. Class attribute selects the subclass.

highlightRolePositions.label: Highlight role positions
highlightRolePositions.description: List of role IDs whose target positions are highlighted on the map during this stage.

highlightRolePawns.label: Highlight role pawns
highlightRolePawns.description: List of role IDs whose assigned pawns are highlighted during this stage.

tickActionMaker.label: Tick action maker
tickActionMaker.description: Per-tick action maker executed each tick during this stage. Class attribute selects the subclass.

visualEffectDef.label: Visual effect def
visualEffectDef.description: RitualVisualEffectDef whose comps are spawned while this stage is active.

spectatorsRequired.label: Spectators required
spectatorsRequired.description: If true, the ritual fails if all spectators leave during this stage.

essential.label: Essential
essential.description: If true, skipping or failing this stage ends the entire ritual.

ignoreDurationToFinishAfterStage.label: Ignore duration to finish after stage
ignoreDurationToFinishAfterStage.description: If true, the ritual does not wait for remaining duration after this stage ends.

allowedSpectateSidesOverride.label: Allowed spectate sides override
allowedSpectateSidesOverride.description: Overrides which sides of the ritual rect spectators may stand on during this stage.

spectateDistanceOverride.label: Spectate distance override
spectateDistanceOverride.description: IntRange overriding the valid spectator distance for this stage. Defaults to 0~0 (no override).

showProgressBar.label: Show progress bar
showProgressBar.description: If true, a progress bar is shown on the ritual spot during this stage.

roleBehaviors.label: Role behaviors
roleBehaviors.description: List of per-role duty and position overrides for this stage.
